name: Wam Microcap Limited
analysis: WMI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.4250, stop A$1.3563, target A$1.5845 (2.32:1) — then trail it.
